alerts.title: CVE-2026-43499 — Possible ARB Increase
alerts.message: OnePlus 15 and possibly other devices are vulnerable to CVE-2026-43499. OnePlus may push an ARB increase in response, especially on kernel 6.12.23. Check ARB before installing any new firmware.
